column4: This file should be populated with ALL records that the EDI convertor received in the 834 file from one or more sources, and populate the status of each record to denote if they are  succesfully converted to XML and transmitted to HPSCIL/HRP. PULSE360 application needs this information to identify the fallout of records that happened within EDI convertor( eg:edifecs ) and thus to balance the inbound and outbound population within the ecosystem.

UST_<Layout Converter Name>_EDIextract_Enrollment_<Healthplan>_<Frequency>_<generatedTimeStamp>.csv

csv
Description
column10: Comments
column11: Mandatory Field in File read Appliction (Y/N)

column4:
Name of the Electronic health data exchange tool which recieves the enrollment data from multiple sources and convert them to xml format
Example - Edifecs/Mercator/SMART etc

Must be populated to Identify the EDI Converter involved with 834 for each customer.
Example : Edifecs ,Mercator etc

This is a Must have field for PULSE to calculate the transaction requests per file per day.
This filename should help to segregate the list of distinct files received from source and hence it is recommended to add created/received timestamp in the name for uniqueness of file name.

column10: Must be populated with the source file frequency.
